title: neobouteloua lophostachya
intro: Neobouteloua lophostachya, commonly known as Blue Granaid, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The therapeutic actions of Neobouteloua lophostachya include sedative, antispasmodic, and diuretic effects, which can help to soothe anxiety, muscle spasms, and urinary issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Neobouteloua lophostachya can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, as well as allergic reactions like skin rashes and itching. In severe cases, excessive consumption may lead to kidney damage and liver toxicity. Additionally, improper use of Neobouteloua lophostachya can interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and reduce their effectiveness.
